message:
fix: correct overall_status to return Ready when all surfaces are ready

ConnectorDescriptor::overall_status was combining with an initial
Unknown state, so even when all three surfaces (auth, prerequisites,
readiness) reported Ready, the result was Unknown. Fix by tracking
Option<DescriptorStatus> and only starting the combination chain when
the first surface is present.

Extract host_tool_requires_approval() helper that only returns true for
Policy, Interactive, and ElevationToken approval modes (not None). Use
it consistently across tool summary, discovered operation, and pipeline
dry-run eligibility checks.

Add test verifying all-Ready surfaces produce Ready overall_status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
